skills.title: Feather Project Context
skills.description: Gather Feather project setup, runtime config, installed plugins, build targets, and connected-session context before editing a Love2D game.

skills.title: Feather MCP Live Sessions
skills.description: Use Feather MCP to inspect and control running desktop sessions through the secure local bridge.

skills.title: Feather Step Debugging
skills.description: Set breakpoints, get source-line context, inspect paused Lua state, step, and continue through Feather MCP debugger tools.

skills.title: Feather Logs And Observability
skills.description: Read logs, observer snapshots, runtime messages, and telemetry before diagnosing game behavior.

skills.title: Feather Performance Profiling
skills.description: Profile frame timing, runtime overhead, hotspots, memory, and performance regressions in live Feather sessions.

skills.title: Feather Session Replay QA
skills.description: Record, load, inspect, and replay game sessions for QA and regression investigation.

skills.title: Feather Shader Graph
skills.description: Create, compile, preview, import, and export Love2D shaders through Feather MCP Shader Graph tools.

skills.title: Feather Particle Effects
skills.description: Create and iterate particle systems with Feather MCP Particle Playground tools and runtime previews.

skills.title: Feather Texture Lab
skills.description: Generate procedural textures, atlas frames, particle sprites, masks, and shader maps through Feather MCP Texture Lab tools.

skills.title: Feather Plugin Iteration
skills.description: Inspect built-in plugins, read live plugin payloads, and route plugin actions through Feather MCP.

skills.title: Feather Debug Builds
skills.description: Build and run debug-oriented desktop, web, Android, and iOS game loops with Feather runtime support.

skills.title: Feather Release Builds
skills.description: Prepare Feather-free release builds, production safety checks, and store/upload workflows.

skills.title: Feather QA Playtester
skills.description: Act as a QA engineer using Feather sessions, replay, logs, debugger state, plugins, and platform builds.
